modules.text:
Connect Teams is a production-ready enterprise collaboration platform architected for 1M+ concurrent users.

This comprehensive system demonstrates full-stack mastery: microservices backend with NestJS, modern React frontend with Next.js, real-time communication via Socket.io, peer-to-peer video with WebRTC, and enterprise-grade infrastructure with Docker + Kubernetes.

Designed to handle millions of transactions monthly with sub-100ms latency.

modules.title: Architecture Overview
modules.text:
A comprehensive microservices + event-driven architecture supporting authentication, organizations, teams, channels, direct messaging, video calls, task management, and file uploads.

The system uses PostgreSQL for persistence, Redis for caching, Socket.io for real-time events, and WebRTC for peer-to-peer video communication.

modules.title: Core Features
modules.text:
Real-time messaging with threads and reactions, video/audio calls with WebRTC, task management with Kanban boards, and calendar views.

File management with S3 pre-signed URLs, multi-tenant organizations, JWT + OAuth authentication, and MFA support.

Designed for enterprise-grade reliability and scalability.

modules.title: Deployment & DevOps
modules.text:
Containerized with Docker across 3 environments (dev, staging, prod).

Kubernetes orchestration ensures high availability and auto-scaling. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines achieve sub-5-minute deployments.

Infrastructure as Code with Terraform for AWS resources including S3, networking, and compute.

modules.title: Security & Performance
modules.text:
Implements JWT + OAuth for authentication, MFA for enhanced security, and follows OWASP best practices.

Redis caching strategy optimizes database queries. Soft-delete patterns maintain data integrity.

Designed to handle millions of transactions monthly with sub-100ms latency.
